- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: Created at .github/copilot-instructions.md.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Confirmed stack and scope: FastAPI backend, web upload UI, YAML/JSON keyword rules, coverage plus correctness metric.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Created backend and frontend structure in current project root and added baseline files.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented parser, normalizer, deterministic rule engine, API endpoints, metrics, config rules, and acceptance test path.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions were specified by project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Configured virtual environment, installed dependencies, and passed backend tests.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and ran a VS Code task to launch Uvicorn backend server.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Backend API launched via task at http://127.0.0.1:8000.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README exists with setup/run/test instructions. This file has been cleaned of HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
